vlm_note: Localized from the REPAIRED post-setup frame (clean 8-piece opening board: 4 settlements + 4 roads, both players 0 dev cards). Board fitted from empty_baseline (desert=9, residual 0.86px); pieces read against the CV's own vertex geometry. Colours per meta: ThePhantom=BLACK, pokeball=RED. Vertices: ThePhantom settlements v8, v23 with roads v8-v7 and v23-v19; pokeball settlements v14, v5 with roads v14-v33 and v5-v4. Independent glyph cross-check: ThePhantom's grant {BRICK,SHEEP,WOOD} equals exactly v8's hexes (WOOD9+BRICK6+SHEEP2) and pokeball's grant {BRICK,WHEAT x2} equals exactly v5's hexes (WHEAT11+BRICK6+WHEAT3) — each matches ONE settlement, so the glyph anchor corroborates this localization and pins the granting (2nd) settlement for both players.
